mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.park_id, o.merchant_id, o.merchant_name, o.service_type, o.customer_id, o.customer_name, o.contact_name, o.contact_phone, o.service_scope, o.demand_desc, o.demand_images, o.order_status, o.priority, o.assign_to, o.assign_time, o.process_content, o.next_follow_time, o.deal_amount, o.deal_time, o.close_reason, o.remark, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, p.name as park_name from biz_merchant_service_order o left join ics_park p on o.park_id = p.id
mapper.select: order by o.create_time desc, o.order_id desc
order by o.create_time desc, o.order_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as pendingCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as processingCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status = '2' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as dealCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status = '3' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as closedCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status = '2' then o.deal_amount else 0 end), 0) as dealAmount from biz_merchant_service_order o
mapper.insert: insert into biz_merchant_service_order ( order_no, park_id, merchant_id, merchant_name, service_type, customer_id, customer_name, contact_name, contact_phone, service_scope, demand_desc, demand_images, order_status, priority, assign_to, assign_time, process_content, next_follow_time, deal_amount, deal_time, close_reason, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{parkId}, #{merchantId}, #{merchantName}, #{serviceType}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{serviceScope}, #{demandDesc}, #{demandImages}, #{orderStatus}, #{priority}, #{assignTo}, #{assignTime}, #{processContent}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{dealAmount}, #{dealTime}, #{closeReason}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
insert into biz_merchant_service_order_log (order_id, action, action_desc, operator, operate_time) values (#{orderId}, #{action}, #{actionDesc}, #{operator}, #{operateTime})
mapper.select: select log_id, order_id, action, action_desc, operator, operate_time from biz_merchant_service_order_log where order_id = #{orderId} order by operate_time desc, log_id desc
